title: A round multicolor UFO was seen flying slow in Santa Cruz do Sul-RS [1996]
excerpt: MARCH 20th, 1996. Time: 19h30. Duration: ongoing during the report. On a night of clear sky and good visibility, an entire neighborhood in the city of Santa Cruz do Sul, State of Rio Grande do Sul, observed a UFO with a round shape, “three times the size of a star” as seen in the sky. […]
text_preview:
MARCH 20th, 1996. Time: 19h30. Duration: ongoing during the report. On a night of clear sky and good visibility, an entire neighborhood in the city of Santa Cruz do Sul, State of Rio Grande do Sul, observed a UFO with a round shape, “three times the size of a star” as seen in the sky. According to the witnesses, the unidentified flying object was multicolored and flew with a slow speed and at a high altitude. The UFO was sighted in the western direction of the city, following a straight path parallel to the horizon.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SI
summary: An entire neighborhood in Santa Cruz do Sul-RS observed a round multicolor UFO flying slowly at high altitude on March 20, 1996.
